project.name: smoketest-app
project.description: Full-stack smoke test exercising all 5 AgentFlow agents

bug_backend.title: Fix auth token missing role claim
bug_backend.expected_flow: nexus assigns -> forge fixes auth.py -> sentinel reviews spec match -> vessel merges
assertions: PR includes role parameter in create_token

bug_frontend.title: Fix Zustand store toggleTask bug
bug_frontend.expected_flow: nexus assigns -> forge fixes store.ts -> sentinel reviews -> vessel merges
assertions: toggleTask uses get() instead of undefined s

feature_backend.title: Implement Redis caching for task queries
feature_backend.expected_flow: nexus assigns -> forge implements cache.py + routes integration -> sentinel reviews -> vessel merges

feature_fullstack.title: Add task filtering and pagination
feature_fullstack.expected_flow: nexus assigns -> forge adds query params + updates frontend -> sentinel reviews both -> vessel merges
assertions: GET /tasks supports completed, priority, limit, offset
Response includes items + total + limit + offset

feature_security.title: Add rate limiting middleware
feature_security.expected_flow: nexus assigns -> forge implements middleware -> sentinel audits security -> vessel merges

security.title: Sanitize task input — prevent XSS
security.expected_flow: nexus assigns -> forge adds pydantic validators -> sentinel security audit -> vessel merges

feature_frontend.title: Add TaskList and TaskItem React components
feature_frontend.expected_flow: nexus assigns -> forge extracts components -> sentinel reviews -> vessel merges
assertions: npm run typecheck + lint + test pass

documentation.title: Complete API documentation in docs/api.md
documentation.expected_flow: nexus assigns to lore -> lore writes docs -> sentinel reviews accuracy -> vessel merges
assertions: All endpoints documented with schemas and examples
